meta.objective: Rewrite the introduction lesson of each released course so it is beginner-safe, motivating, and does not rely on concepts taught later.

tasks.title: Rewrite all five course introductions
tasks.objective: Make each first lesson motivation-led, beginner-safe, and self-contained while preserving stable IDs and cumulative prerequisites.
acceptanceCriteria: The LLM, World Models, Generative Models, RL & Control, and Embodied AI first lessons open with a compelling plain-language question or scenario and explain why the field matters.
No first lesson relies on mathematics, notation, or technical mechanisms that are only taught in later lessons; any unavoidable term is defined before use.
Each introduction keeps an honest concrete example, limitation, prediction-led activity, deterministic changed-case check, and clear next-use statement.
Exact objectives, objective coverage, guides, assessments, motion, code guidance, manifests, and review documentation agree for every changed introduction.
Focused curriculum and objective-coverage checks pass.
tasks.details: Audit and rewrite the first canonical lesson in all five released courses. Preserve lesson IDs, routes, persistence keys, static hosting, and the Orient → Learn → Try → Test → Extend contract.
validationCommands: node --test tests/course-introductions.test.mjs tests/objective-coverage.test.mjs tests/interactive-learning.test.mjs tests/anime-motion.test.mjs tests/curriculum-architecture.test.mjs
acceptanceCheckResults: All five first lessons are prerequisite-free, notation-free, motivation-led orientations with exact objective joins.
Focused introduction, objective, interaction, motion, and curriculum tests pass.
evidence: Independent remediation closed the World Models scenario mismatch and research-template language leaks.
Regression test protects coherent scenarios, concrete introductory interactions, and learner-facing language.

tasks.title: Independently grade and verify introductions
tasks.objective: Prove the rewritten introductions fulfill every objective and remain accessible, coherent, and regression-safe across the released course system.
acceptanceCriteria: An independent semantic grader passes every changed objective across explanation, mechanism, worked example, boundary, and committed check with no unresolved partials.
Representative browser QA confirms the five introductions orient and motivate learners without overflow or interaction regressions.
Page-grade provenance is refreshed only after the independent review passes.
npm run lint and npm test pass in full.
tasks.details: Run independent objective/page review, repair any semantic gaps, update reviewed evidence, complete browser QA, and execute the full required verification suite.
acceptanceCheckResults: Independent semantic regrade passes all 11 changed objectives and all five whole introductions with no partials.
Browser QA passes all five introductions, the LLM trust-boundary state change, and representative 390px and 1440px layouts.
Page-grade fingerprints match current source and the generated 187-page report verifies.
Lint, static export, artifact verification, and all 166 regression tests pass.
evidence: Independent grader: 11/11 objective PASS and 5/5 whole-introduction PASS.
GitHub Pages static export verified 182 lesson routes plus 44 legacy forwards.
All preserved artifacts and 187 page-grade records verified.
